data.title: Tenaris (TS) beats Q4 estimated earnings by 11.54%, reports EPS of $0.87 vs $0.78 estimate. Revenue up $150 million from last year.
data.description: Tenaris (NYSE: TS) released its Q4 earnings on February 18, 2026, at 4:30 PM. They surpassed estimated earnings by 11.54%, with an EPS of $0.87 compared to the expected $0.78. Revenue increased by $150.00 million from the previous year. In terms of previous earnings, the company had also exceeded EPS expectations... Reference full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: eBay exceeds Q4 revenue estimates, reports $2.97 billion revenue, $1.41 Adjusted EPS. Agrees to acquire Depop. Stock surges.
data.description: eBay Inc (NASDAQ: EBAY) released its fourth-quarter financial results, surpassing expectations and offering strong guidance. Q4 revenue reached $2.97 billion, exceeding estimates of $2.89 billion, while Q4 Adjusted EPS stood at $1.41, surpassing estimates of $1.35. Total revenue rose by 15% year-over-year, with gross merchandise volume increasing by 10% to $21.2 billion. The company reported generating $595 million in operating cash flow and $478 million in free cash flow from continuing operations in the quarter. As of December 31, 2025, eBay held $4.8 billion in total cash, cash equivalents, and non-equity investments. eBay stock is witnessing notable strength in the market following these impressive results. More details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Kantata earns #32 spot on G2's 2026 Best Software Awards for Project Management Products, 7th consecutive year in top 50.
data.description: In a joint announcement from London and Irvine, California, Kantata, a prominent global provider of Professional Services Automation (PSA) solutions, revealed their inclusion in G2’s 2026 Best Software Awards. Securing the 32nd spot on the Project Management Products list for this year further solidifies Kantata's position in the industry. This achievement signifies Kantata's consistent performance, as this marks the seventh consecutive year the company has been listed among the top 50 Project Management Products. This recognition is significant as the market is typically saturated with generic work management tools, demonstrating Kantata's enduring impact. Being recognized in these awards underscores their reputation as one of the leading and most reliable providers in the sector.

data.title: Great Wolf Lodge offers Spring SplashFest celebration with 84-degree indoor water park for families, ideal Spring Break option.
data.description: Families seeking a convenient Spring Break getaway can now enjoy the perfect vacation spot in Chicago. The resort offers an indoor water park that maintains a comfortable 84-degree temperature year-round. This new Spring Break destination is ideal for families looking to escape the winter blues and enjoy a relaxing vacation.

data.title: Kingland Systems introduces Firm of Tomorrow framework for public accounting with focus on innovation and growth. #PRNewswire #Accounting #Investment
data.description: In Clear Lake, Iowa, on February 18, 2026, a prominent enterprise data, risk, and regulatory software provider known as Kingland Systems (Kingland) revealed its unveiling of the Firm of Tomorrow framework for public accounting investment. This innovative strategy aims to assist firms in adapting to future challenges.

data.title: Nasdaq rallies in stock market, Dow Jones rises, Nvidia's stock jumps on deal with Meta. Solar stocks shine. Breakout stocks decline.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index saw an increase as market breadth widened. Notably, Nvidia stock surged following its agreement with Meta. Furthermore, the Nasdaq demonstrated a rally, while solar stocks performed well. However, certain breakout stocks saw a decline in their performance. Overall, the market showed positive movement with specific sectors outperforming others.

data.title: Primo Brands, Onyx Renewables, and PowerFlex complete 13MW solar project at Poland Spring in Hollis, Maine. Positive impact for the state.
data.description: HOLLIS, Maine-- Primo Brands, in collaboration with Onyx Renewables and PowerFlex, have successfully completed the energization of a 13-megawatt DC onsite solar project at the Poland Spring facility in Hollis, Maine. This significant project signifies a positive impact for not only Hollis and the local community but also for the state of Maine.

data.title: Abony Acquisition Corp. I prices $200 million IPO with 20 million units at $10 each on Nasdaq, trading starting Feb 19.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, Abony Acquisition Corp. I revealed the details of its initial public offering, with 20,000,000 units priced at $10.00 each. The trading of these units is set to start on February 19, 2026, on the Global Market tier of The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC under the ticker symbol “AACOU.”

data.description: In 2025, the parent company of a cryptocurrency exchange bought multiple platforms. At the same time, it discreetly submitted for an initial public offering with the SEC.

data.title: Monument Mining Limited named top 50 TSX Venture Company for 2025, earns spot on 2026 TSX Venture 50 list. President and CEO link: https://monumentmining.com/videos/
data.description: Monument Mining Limited, based in Vancouver, has been acknowledged as one of the leading companies on the TSX Venture Exchange for 2025. The company, listed under TSX-V: MMY and FSE: D7Q1, has secured a spot on the prestigious 2026 TSX Venture 50™ list. This recognition highlights Monument's impressive performance in the market. President and CEO Cathy Zhai presented the achievement at the TSX Venture 50™ event, emphasizing the company's success. For further details, the presentation can be viewed at https://monumentmining.com/videos/.

data.title: Tenaris S.A. reports 2025 Q4 results: $2.995B net sales, $554M operating income, $461M net income, $717M EBITDA.
data.description: Tenaris S.A. announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and year ended December 31, 2025. In Q4 2025, net sales were $2.995 billion, up 1% from Q3 2025 and 5% from Q4 2024. Operating income was $554 million, down 7% from Q3 2025 and 1% from Q4 2024. Net income was $461 million, up 2% from Q3 2025 but down 11% from Q4 2024. Earnings per ADS were $0.87, up 2% from Q3 2025 but down 7% from Q4 2024. EBITDA was $717 million, down 5% from Q3 2025 and 1% from Q4 2024. Free cash flow for the quarter was $665 million, resulting in a net cash position of $3.3 billion as of December 31, 2025. The company is proposing a dividend per share of $0.89 for approval at the annual general shareholders' meeting in May 2026. Overall, the company showed resilience in its operations despite challenges such as lower drilling activity in key markets and tariffs on imports of steel bars and pipes into the United States.

data.title: FTG announced 2025 financial results: $209.9M bookings, $148.5M backlog, $191M revenue, $32.7M EBITDA, $13.5M net earnings.
data.description: FTG Corporation reported financial results for full year and Q4 2025. Full year highlights include $209.9M bookings (14% increase from 2024), $191.0M revenue (18% rise from 2024), $32.7M adjusted EBITDA (27% growth from 2024), and $13.5M adjusted net earnings (31% increase from 2024). Q4 highlights include $51.7M revenue (14.2% rise from Q4 2024), $7.9M adjusted EBITDA, and $3.7M adjusted net earnings. The company emphasized strategic investments, growth in defense business, diversifying to reduce tariff risks, and value creation from FLYHT acquisition. They added new leadership and board members. Sales, gross margin, net earnings, and EPS all increased from FY 2024. Management presented Adjusted Net Earnings as an important metric.

data.title: FCC approves rules to expand 900 MHz band to 10 MHz, following success of Anterix-enabled private wireless deployments.
data.description: The move towards implementing 10 MHz broadband in the 900 MHz band is an extension of the demonstrated achievements seen in Anterix-facilitated private wireless broadband installations. This transition signifies a significant advancement as organizations now have access to increased bandwidth, enhancing communication capabilities and efficiency. The 10 MHz allocation offers a notable improvement in data transmission speeds and network performance, optimizing operations for various industries. This step underscores the continued progress and adoption of reliable private broadband solutions, with the potential to revolutionize connectivity standards.

data.title: Analysts eye $50 for SOL as bearish trend continues; MVRV hints at potential bottom, preventing crash.
data.description: Analysts are predicting a bearish trend for SOL as seen on various chart timeframes, with a short-term target set at $50. The MVRV indicator for SOL is currently at an "extreme" state, raising concerns about the possibility of another price crash.

data.title: Activist investor urges Bitcoin miner Riot to seize $21B AI opportunity with urgency.
data.description: A well-known activist investor has emphasized that Bitcoin mining company Riot Platforms must act with increased urgency to take advantage of the significant Artificial Intelligence (AI) prospects.

data.title: Experts discuss important factors when choosing a home inspection company to help homebuyers make informed decisions.
data.description: In Cedar Rapids, Iowa on February 18, 2026, an article discussed the importance of effective communication, experience, and thorough inspection procedures for assisting homebuyers in making informed decisions. It focused on the significance of selecting a trustworthy home inspection company. The HelloNation article highlighted Logan Loftus as a credible source for guidance on this matter.
